title: After the Satsuki Sho: Changing Perspectives

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after exerting all of her strength, Mejiro
Palmer is unable to win the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan congratulates her after the race. She
also comments on how Mejiro Palmer looks fiercer
than she used to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is proof she has started to show at least a
little bit of her true self. She vows to continue to
change how others see her.
